Text.Page:
Crafting for the War Effort

Support the federation war effort by crafting staves!
Yes there is need for staves. Nunahd in Bleakrock holds the design to make officer's staves. Retrieve it for our crafters?
Jennes sent you? Here for a design, are you? You're in luck today.

The focus is now on getting this design to as many crafters as possible. As a crafter, one hopes you will help us out.

Take this design for crafting an officer's staff and learn it.
